title: Two hikers rescued after fall on B.C.'s Mount Brunswick near Lions Bay
description: A female hiker slipped and a male hiker also fell while trying to reach her. He was in critical condition.

title: ‘Like the Mariana Trench’: Potholes are bad this year. Here’s why.
description: This winter's freeze-thaw conditions have caused an increase in potholes, which are being exacerbated by climate change, and temporary patches are the only option until the ground thaws.

title: His Wife Watched Him Park In All 108 Spots For Nearly Two Years. Now He’s After One With Over 400
description: One father of two spent nearly two years methodically parking in every space at his local supermarket, and he already has a bigger car park lined up

title: UK city centre locked down with bars 'closed' as police seal off area
description: Police have locked down part of Nottingham city centre following a car crash with a pedestrian

title: Iran warns of retaliation for US power plant threats; NATO allies ‘coming together on Hormuz’
Undefeated HNB Assurance claim Fairfirst Trophy with four-wicket win
description: HNB Assurance emerged undefeated champions of the 8th MCA-Fairfirst ’F’ Division 20-Over League Cricket Tournament and carried away the ‘Fairfirst Trophy,’ beating McLarens Group by four wickets at the CCC Grounds last week.

title: Killing off gas low-hanging fruit for climate goals
Inside Michael Jackson's Neverland bedroom with 'creepy' statues and Peter Pan music
description: Former detective Ruby Wolff, who raided Neverland in the wake of child abuse allegations 23 years ago, returned to the singer's ranch

title: Carabao Cup final: Big statement – Oliseh reacts as Arsenal lose to Man City
description: Former Super Eagles captain, Sunday Oliseh, has claimed that Manchester City’s 2-0 win over Arsenal in the Carabao Cup final was “a big statement”. Nico O’Reilly scored two headers in the second half as City won their first piece of silverware this season. title: Next Dogecoin: Bitcoin Reacts to Oil Shock as XRP Expands and Pepeto Gains Attention
description: Global financial markets entered a new volatility phase as oil crossed $100 for the first time in months, linked to geopolitical tensions in the Middle East disrupting energy routes. Rising commodity prices pressure central banks around the world to keep interest rates higher for longer. When liquidity tightens, speculative assets react fast.
